name: pi-zflow-workspace
description: pi-zflow — modular Pi harness customization suite — monorepo workspace

scripts.test: npm run test:core && npm run test:artifacts
scripts.test:artifacts: npx tsx --test packages/pi-zflow-artifacts/test/*.test.ts 2>/dev/null || echo 'INFO: artifact tests not yet created'
scripts.test:all: for pkg in packages/*/; do if [ -d "$pkg/test" ]; then echo "=== Testing $pkg ==="; npx tsx --test "$pkg/test"/*.test.ts; fi; done
